title: Tangy Flaky Saudi-Arabian Creme Fraiche Pilaf
description: A delicious one-pot dish featuring creme fraiche, flaky fry-grind-rice-khao-khua, and a tangy twist.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cumin, cinnamon, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fry-grind-rice-khao-khua and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the lemon juice and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid.
Cook for 18 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the creme fraiche and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve the pilaf hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
